'''Asteroid 7785''' was an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] in [[the Graveyard]], the [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] that formed from what remained of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] after its [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destruction]] by the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star's]] [[Superlaser/Legends|superlaser]].

A rumor, circulated by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], claimed that the [[Royal Palace of Alderaan/Legends|Royal Palace]] of Alderaan had been discovered intact on Asteroid 7785. He hoped this rumor would lure [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and any other of the survivors of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] to Alderaan, where [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Janus Bonn]] waited for them. Vader soon added a story that a survivor had been discovered in the asteroid who claimed to be [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]]. Vader even built a replica of the Palace inside the asteroid as a trap. Unfortunately for Vader, a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] agents intercepted the message from [[Hanos Darr]] and [[Zaz Kamiroz]] before it reached Leia Organa, and arrived at the asteroid before she did. Vader's trap was sprung, but not on its intended victims. Though the Palace had not actually survived intact, a tiny fragment of the Royal Palace's structure was ''indeed'' discovered in asteroid 7785.

{{Ast-stub}}
